Name: ffmpeg
Description: Complete solution to record, convert and stream audio and video
Provides: libavcodec.so libavdevice.so libavfilter.so libavformat.so libavutil.so libpostproc.so libswresample.so libswscale.so
Depends On: alsa-lib aom dav1d fontconfig freetype2 fribidi gmp gsm libdrm libpulse mesa libopus libsrt libvorbis rav1e sdl2 svt-av1 libx264 libx265 xz zlib libva libass librsvg vulkan-icd-loader zimg libwebp libvpx soxr openssl
